meaning: n.四人的一组,四人对抗赛adj.四人做的,由四组成的
examples: Can you make up a foursome for tennis tomorrow?
The foursome released their second CD this month.
I glared at the merry foursome.
The next morning, the winning foursome entered the clubhouse with bragging rights for the week.
It will probably soon allow you to count strokes of others in your foursome.
